title: Foul Potion
description:
Deal [blue]12[/blue] damage to EVERYONE.
Can be thrown at the [gold]Merchant[/gold] for [blue]100[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] instead.
notes: In combat, deals 12 damage to all non-pet enemies. Outside combat, can be thrown at the Merchant or a Fake Merchant event to gain 100 Gold instead. Usage changes based on context.
